entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop cultivated in subtropical India and the subject of the yield and GWP study

entities.name: SUBTROPICAL INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where rice cultivation and GHG emission analysis were conducted

entities.name: GLOBAL WARMING POTENTIAL
entities.description: A measure of how much heat a greenhouse gas traps in the atmosphere, calculated per kg of rice grain

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: Emissions of gases that contribute to the greenhouse effect, specifically CO2 and CH4 in this study

entities.name: CO2
entities.description: Carbon dioxide, a greenhouse gas analyzed using GOSAT satellite data

entities.name: CH4
entities.description: Methane, a greenhouse gas analyzed using GOSAT satellite data

entities.name: NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of applying fertilizers to crops to optimize growth and reduce environmental impact

entities.name: GOSAT SATELLITE DATA
entities.description: Satellite-based data used to analyze decadal variations in CO2 and CH4

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Long-term trials used to validate the CERES-Rice and DNDC models

entities.name: CERES-RICE
entities.description: Crop Environment Resource Synthesis model used to predict rice yield

entities.name: DNDC
entities.description: De-nitrification and Decomposition model used to predict global warming potential

entities.name: SIMULATION TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A computational approach used to predict rice yield and GWP under different treatments

entities.name: RICE YIELD
entities.description: The amount of rice grain produced per unit area

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: A nutrient management treatment using synthetic fertilizers

entities.name: ORGANIC FERTILIZER
entities.description: A nutrient management treatment using organic matter

entities.name: VERMICOMPOST
entities.description: Organic matter produced by earthworms used as organic fertilizer

entities.name: INTEGRATED NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A nutrient management treatment combining organic and chemical fertilizers
